detailPageObservation.interpretation: Topic detail used topic.signalIds / signals length as denominator while audit evidence and memo data still had 15 sources.

codeFix.summary: Topic audit summaries and overview display now use audit evidence/readings as the denominator when topic signal pointers drift, and sanitize impossible coverage values like 15/0 or 15/1.
